name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I’m so sorry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I have two things to say to you: | Friend --

If you or anyone you know is Muslim-American, Mexican-American, a woman, an immigrant, or anyone else Trump has attacked, then I have one thing to say to you. Actually, two things:

First: I'm so sorry for what you’ve had to listen to on the news and read in the papers every single day.

And second: We're going to fight back, and we're going to make sure that none of his horrible ideas ever become law -- that's a promise. But Hillary is counting on you to be a critical part of that fight, and that starts today with our brand new Stop Trump Fund.

**Will you chip in right now? It's not about the money -- it's about saying to the world that you're on the team that's going to stand up to Trump's bullying once and for all. We’ll even send you a free sticker to thank you for your support:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MjA2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwOTgxOTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MjA2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwOTgxOTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Kristina

Kristina Schake
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MjA2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwOTgxOTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MjA2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwOTgxOTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

[Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0MjA2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAwOTgxOTA0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: Will your name be on my mom’s card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
My mom will love this: | Friend --

With all the noise out there, it can be hard to remember how many of us there are who are standing with my mom, fighting by her side to break down the barriers that hold people back.

So for Mother’s Day, I thought we could show her just how many of us are on her side -- that’s why I'm putting together a Mother’s Day card for the whole campaign family to sign.

**Will you take a moment to add your name and send my mom some good thoughts? We're going to give her the card and all the signatures on Sunday, and I know how much she’d appreciate hearing from you:** [ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MjUyNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMDczNTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MjUyNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMDczNTI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you. I’m so happy you’re part of this team -- and I know my mom is, too.

Chelsea

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

name: Russ Feingold
subject: A shame
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Medicare and Social Security are on the line. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e21/49607572/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") Friend, It's a shame. Each election cycle, Republicans call for cutting Social Security and privatizing Medicare. This week, I've met with seniors in Wausau, Green Bay, Eau Claire, Madison, and Milwaukee, and they weren't talking about how we could privatize and slash these programs. They spoke of how the benefits they receive from Social Security and Medicare are now more important than ever. **Here's what folks are telling me: They're struggling. They're feeling financial pressure.** These issues aren't unique to just Wausau or Milwaukee; seniors across the country deserve a strong safety net. I'll fight for this in the Senate, but I need strong allies like you by my side. **[Will you add your name today to show your support for strengthening our safety net for our seniors -- and for generations to come?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e21/49607572/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e21/49607572/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") Despite a clear path to strengthening these necessary, lifesaving programs, Republicans continue their tired arguments. This election cycle, we've seen many of these same talking points repeated. Senator Johnson has repeatedly called Social Security a "Ponzi scheme." He even said that it's "a shame" that it wasn't privatized. **Well, let me tell you -- it's a shame that Senator Johnson isn't listening to Wisconsin's seniors.** I am listening. And I'm going to continue fighting to protect and strengthen these programs. But we know we're up against Republicans like Senator Johnson, who are more concerned with pleasing the special interests than they are with listening to seniors. **[Will you join me and call for strengthening Social Security and Medicare?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e21/49607572/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema")** Thank you for taking action today. Russ Feingold | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e21/49607572/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-06_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e5e/49607572/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e5f/49607572/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e5c/49607572/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4290/1c469400/501a06d/3562e5d/49607572/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What it's like to live in poverty
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
In the United States today, the wealthiest country in the history of the world, 47 million Americans are living in poverty.
Almost 22 percent of American children are poor and we have the highest child poverty rate of almost any major country on earth.
Let's be clear. Living in poverty doesn't just mean you don't have enough money to buy a big screen TV, a fancy laptop, or the latest iPhone. It goes much deeper than that.
Living in poverty means you are less likely to have a good grocery store in your community selling healthy food. Far too often it means you don't know where your next meal is going to come from. Living in poverty means you are less likely to have access to a doctor, dentist or mental health care provider. It means you have less access to public transportation, which makes it harder to find a job. It means you are less likely to have access to child care.
In the United States of America, poverty is often a death sentence.
Yesterday, I spoke about poverty in McDowell County, West Virginia -- one of the poorest counties in one of the poorest states in America. In 2014, over 35 percent of the residents in McDowell lived in poverty, including nearly half of the children. The roads are crumbling and only 6 percent of adults have a college education. Less than two-thirds have graduated high school. It has the lowest life expectancy for men in the entire nation. I hope you'll watch part of my speech on poverty and share it with friends and family on social media.
[**Bernie Sanders Speaks on Poverty in McDowell County, West Virginia**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence")

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence")

[](https://www.facebook.com/berniesanders/videos/1042660939122243/ "https://www.facebook.com/berniesanders/videos/1042660939122243/") [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FqdWyOTvLg04&original_referer=https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FqdWyOTvLg04&original_referer=https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence")
Poverty is an issue we must address. In 2011, the American Journal of Public Health found that 130,000 people died in just one year alone as a result of poverty.
This is not an issue we can just sweep under the rug and hope it will go away. Because it won't.
And when I talk about it being too late for establishment politics and economics, this is what I mean. When I talk about thinking big and outside the box, about rejecting incremental change, I am talking about the millions of Americans who live in poverty who have been tossed out, left behind, and abandoned by the rich and powerful. We need to create an economy that works for all of us, not just the 1 percent.
Here's what we need to do:
1. Rebuild our country's crumbling infrastructure. A $1 trillion investment in our infrastructure will create at least 13 million jobs all over America - jobs that cannot be outsourced.
2. We must rewrite our disastrous trade policies that enable corporate America to shut down plans in places like West Virginia and move them to Mexico, China, and other low-wage countries.
3. We can create 1 million jobs for disadvantaged youths through legislation I introduced with Rep. John Conyers of Michigan.
4. We need to increase the wages of at least 53 million American workers by raising the minimum wage from a starvation wage of $7.25 an hour to $15 an hour.
5. At a time when women workers earn 79 cents for every dollar a man earns, we need to sign the Paycheck Fairness Act into law. Equal pay for equal work.
6. We need to make health care a right for every man, woman, and child through a Medicare for All single-payer system.
7. We need to treat drug addiction like a mental health issue, not a criminal issue.
8. We need to ensure every worker in this country has at least 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave, two weeks of paid vacation, and one week of paid sick days.
9. We need to impose a tax on Wall Street to make public colleges and universities tuition free while substantially reducing student debt.
10. At a time when half of older workers have no retirement savings, we're not going to cut Social Security, we're going to expand it so people can retire with dignity and respect.

No president can do all of these things alone. We need millions of Americans to begin to stand up and fight back and demand a government that represents all of us. That is the political revolution.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Watch the Video](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/share/poverty-is-a-death-sentence")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

We can create 1 million jobs for disadvantaged youths through legislation I introduced with Rep. John Conyers of Michigan. 4. We need to increase the wages of at least 53 million American workers by raising the minimum wage from a starvation wage of $7.25 an hour to $15 an hour. 5. At a time when women workers earn 79 cents for every dollar a man earns, we need to sign the Paycheck Fairness Act into law. Equal pay for equal work. 6. We need to make health care a right for every man, woman, and child through a Medicare for All single-payer system. 7. We need to treat drug addiction like a mental health issue, not a criminal issue. 8. We need to ensure every worker in this country has at least 12 weeks of paid family and medical leave, two weeks of paid vacation, and one week of paid sick days. 9. We need to impose a tax on Wall Street to make public colleges and universities tuition free while substantially reducing student debt. 10. At a time when half of older workers have no retirement savings, we're not going to cut Social Security, we're going to expand it so people can retire with dignity and respect. No president can do all of these things alone. We need millions of Americans to begin to stand up and fight back and demand a government that represents all of us. That is the political revolution. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Murphy Miles
subject: thank you, teachers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
| **Friends, it 's Teacher Appreciation Week -- don't forget to thank a teacher who's made an impact on your life! Patrick's committed to making sure each child gets the best education possible. Check out what he's been up to on the trail!**
---
|
### Joining the Team:
## FLORIDA EDUCATION ASSOCIATION
The FEA is the state's largest association of professional employees, with more than 140,000 members, and we're excited they're on board! "The Florida Education Association is proud to recommend Patrick Murphy for U.S. Senate because he has proven time and again his wholehearted commitment to education and to Florida's teachers and education professionals. We know he will continue being a champion for education in the U.S. Senate and we're excited to support Patrick's campaign," said FEA President Joanne McCall. | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
|
### Checked In At
## LIMESTONE CREEK PARK
During Teacher Appreciation Week, Patrick spoke with former L.M. Davis Elementary School students and teachers to recognize the school's historic role in the community. | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---|---
|
### Straight from patrick
## TEACHER APPRECIATION WEEK
Great teachers are essential for any child to receive a great education. I'd like to take this chance to acknowledge two of the teachers I'm most grateful for: | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Ms. Vanegas, thank you for your patience, your trust, your dedication, and your belief in my success. Your influence on me -- from math class, to my adult life as a CPA, small businessman, public servant, and beyond -- is immeasurable.
[](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
---
Thank you for your mentorship, Coach Koch. The lessons you taught on the football field on teamwork and building relationships to achieve our common goals together have stayed with me.

\-- Patrick
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b9/3262222495/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyforSenate") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255ba/3262222495/VEsO/ "https://twitter.com/PatrickMurphyFL") | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255bb/3262222495/VEsP/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9Ltzfgv7ynA25HRqEbDVEg")
---|---|---
[Contribute](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae23ed/738133e4/354448fd/7f8255b8/3262222495/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160506pm?recurring=true&amount=25.00")
